login.tagline: Build the health plan you actually need.
login.disclaimer: By continuing, you agree that all content is for informational purposes only and not medical advice.

home.visitPlanToAdd: Visit your plan to add modalities
home.streakSub: You're building a real habit. Keep it going.
home.disclaimer: Content is for general wellness purposes only and not medical advice. Consult your healthcare provider for medical decisions.

plan.title: My Plan
plan.noPlanText: Complete the questionnaire in the web app to generate your personalized wellness plan.
plan.unlockProvidersSub: See matched provider contacts — upgrade to Plus
plan.footerText: Tap any item for details. Not medical advice — discuss with your provider.
plan.noLocalProviders: No in-person providers found in your area
plan.lockedRationale: Unlock the full rationale on the HealthPlanFactory web app.
plan.couldNotCheckout: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
plan.noCheckoutUrl: No checkout URL returned. Please try the web app.
plan.couldNotConnect: Could not connect. Please check your connection.

journal.title: Check-In
journal.noEntriesText: Tap + to log your first wellness check-in.
journal.disclaimer: Check-ins are for personal tracking only. This is not medical advice. If you are in crisis, call or text 988.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.dailyCommitmentsSub: Check off your daily habits to build consistency.
accountability.noEntryToday: No check-in today. Tap Check-In to log your daily check-in.
accountability.disclaimer: Tracking is for personal accountability only. Not medical advice.
accountability.buddyMatchingBody: Get paired with an accountability buddy who shares your wellness goals. Check in together, celebrate streaks, and stay motivated as a team.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.disclaimer: Not medical advice. For emergencies, call 911 or text 988.
coach.openingMessage:
Hey! I’m your HealthPlanFactory accountability coach. I’m here to help you stay on track, answer questions about your wellness plan, and celebrate your wins.

What’s on your mind today?
coach.newConversationBody: This will clear your current chat history. Your coach memory (goals, preferences) is preserved.
coach.connectionError: I’m having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.
coach.chip1: How am I doing this week?
coach.chip4: Help me build a morning routine

chips.howAmIDoing: How am I doing this week?
chips.morningRoutine: Help me build a morning routine

settings.title: Settings
settings.medicalDisclaimer1: HealthPlan Factory provides general wellness information for educational purposes only. Content on this app is not intended to be a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.
settings.medicalDisclaimer2: If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911 immediately.
settings.medicalDisclaimer3: If you are in mental health crisis, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or text HOME to 741741 (Crisis Text Line).
settings.medicalDisclaimerBody: HealthPlan Factory provides general wellness information for educational purposes only. Content on this app is not intended to be a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
settings.emergencyDisclaimer: If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911 immediately.
settings.crisisDisclaimer: If you are in mental health crisis, call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) or text HOME to 741741 (Crisis Text Line).

settings.signOutConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to sign out?

settings.restoreSuccessBody: Your purchases have been restored successfully.

settings.referEarnSub: Give a friend their first plan free — you earn $3

referral.title: Refer & Earn
referral.subtitle: Give your friend their first month of Plus free — you earn $3 credit when they build their first plan.
referral.howItWorksStep1: Share your link with a friend.
referral.howItWorksStep2: They sign up and build their first plan.
referral.howItWorksStep3: Their first month of Plus is free — you earn $3 credit.
referral.noHistory: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started.
referral.linkCopiedDesc: Your referral link is on the clipboard.

healthConnect.title: Connected Services
healthConnect.heroBody: Connect Apple Health or Google Fit to automatically log your daily steps, sleep, active minutes, and mindfulness — no manual tracking required.
healthConnect.webNotice: Health integration is available on the iOS and Android apps. Install the native app to connect your device health data.
healthConnect.privacyNote: Health data is stored securely and only used to improve your wellness score. We never sell your health data. You can disconnect at any time.
healthConnect.requiresNative: Health integration requires the native iOS or Android app.
healthConnect.notAvailableBody: Health integration requires the native iOS or Android app.
healthConnect.connectedBody: {{source}} is now connected. Your steps, sleep, and activity data will sync automatically.
healthConnect.connectedAlertApple: Apple Health is now connected. Your steps, sleep, and activity data will sync automatically.
healthConnect.connectedAlertGoogle: Google Fit is now connected. Your steps, sleep, and activity data will sync automatically.
healthConnect.permissionDeniedBody: Health permissions are required to sync your data. You can enable them in your device settings.
healthConnect.disconnectBodyApple: Stop syncing data from Apple Health?
healthConnect.disconnectBodyGoogle: Stop syncing data from Google Fit?
